fields.label: Positioning Statement
fields.hint: For [target audience] who [need], [brand] is the [category] that [key benefit] because [reason to believe].
fields.placeholder: For [target audience] who [need], [brand] is the [category] that [key benefit] because [reason to be

fields.label: Category / Market
fields.hint: What space do you compete in?
fields.placeholder: What space do you compete in?

fields.label: Target Audience (Primary)
fields.hint: Who is your #1 audience in one sentence?
fields.placeholder: Who is your #1 audience in one sentence?

fields.label: Key Differentiator
fields.hint: What makes you different from every competitor?
fields.placeholder: What makes you different from every competitor?

fields.label: Competitive Alternative
fields.hint: If you did not exist, what would they use?
fields.placeholder: If you did not exist, what would they use?

fields.label: Mission Statement
fields.hint: What you do, for whom, and why it matters — in one sentence
fields.placeholder: What you do, for whom, and why it matters — in one sentence

fields.label: Vision Statement
fields.hint: The future state you are working toward
fields.placeholder: The future state you are working toward

fields.label: Brand Promise
fields.hint: The one commitment you make to every customer
fields.placeholder: The one commitment you make to every customer

fields.label: Core Values (3-5)
fields.hint: The principles that guide every decision
fields.placeholder: The principles that guide every decision

fields.label: Brand Personality
fields.hint: If your brand were a person, how would they act?
fields.placeholder: If your brand were a person, how would they act?

fields.label: Brand Voice (3 adjectives)
fields.hint: e.g. Bold, Warm, Expert — these never change
fields.placeholder: e.g. Bold, Warm, Expert — these never change

fields.label: Tone Range
fields.hint: How does the voice flex? Formal to casual, serious to playful
fields.placeholder: How does the voice flex? Formal to casual, serious to playful

fields.label: We Say / We Never Say
fields.hint: Words and phrases you always use vs. always avoid
fields.placeholder: Words and phrases you always use vs. always avoid

fields.label: Writing Style
fields.hint: Short sentences? Data-driven? Story-led? Technical?
fields.placeholder: Short sentences? Data-driven? Story-led? Technical?

fields.label: Tagline / Slogan
fields.hint: Your brand in 5-8 words
fields.placeholder: Your brand in 5-8 words

fields.label: 10-Second Pitch
fields.hint: One sentence. Use it at networking events, in email intros, when someone asks 'what do you do?'
fields.placeholder: One sentence. Use it at networking events, in email intros, when someone asks 'what do you do?'

fields.label: 30-Second Pitch
fields.hint: 3-4 sentences. Use it in meetings, on calls, in LinkedIn messages.
fields.placeholder: 3-4 sentences. Use it in meetings, on calls, in LinkedIn messages.

fields.label: 60-Second Pitch
fields.hint: A short paragraph. Use it for investor intros, partnership conversations, panel introductions.
fields.placeholder: A short paragraph. Use it for investor intros, partnership conversations, panel introductions.

fields.label: Press Release Boilerplate
fields.hint: The 'About Us' paragraph at the end of every press release
fields.placeholder: The 'About Us' paragraph at the end of every press release

fields.label: Email Signature Tagline
fields.hint: One line under your name in every email
fields.placeholder: One line under your name in every email

fields.label: Social Media Bio
fields.hint: Twitter/LinkedIn/Instagram bio — max 160 characters
fields.placeholder: Twitter/LinkedIn/Instagram bio — max 160 characters

fields.label: Website Hero Headline
fields.hint: The main headline on your homepage
fields.placeholder: The main headline on your homepage

fields.label: Website Hero Subheadline
fields.hint: The supporting line under the headline
fields.placeholder: The supporting line under the headline

fields.label: Conference Speaker Bio
fields.hint: 3rd person, 50-75 words, for event programs
fields.placeholder: 3rd person, 50-75 words, for event programs
